title: WelcomHeritage is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: WelcomHeritage is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, WelcomHeritage in Navi Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About WelcomHeritage:
WelcomHeritage is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WelcomHeritage!
